description_long: This is a pair of black tactical gloves designed for urban use, featuring reinforced knuckle protection and segmented finger joints for flexibility. The gloves have a matte black finish with a slightly textured surface on the palm and knuckle areas, likely for enhanced grip and durability. The wrist area is extended and appears to be made of a stretchable material, providing a snug fit and additional wrist coverage. The knuckle guards are made from a harder, shinier material, offering impact resistance. The gloves are anatomically shaped, with pre-curved fingers and visible paneling for ergonomic comfort. There are no visible logos, patterns, or closure mechanisms, suggesting a slip-on or elastic design.
description: A pair of black tactical gloves with reinforced knuckles, textured palms, and extended wrist coverage, designed for durability and grip in urban environments.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the reinforced knuckle guards, textured palm area, and extended wrist cuffs.
description_view_1: Top-down view displaying the full length of both gloves, highlighting the anatomical shaping and paneling.
description_view_2: Opposite front angled view, again emphasizing the knuckle protection and ergonomic finger design.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the extended wrist cuffs and the overall thickness of the gloves.
